title: thelymitra polychroma
intro: Thelymitra polychroma, also known as the variegated sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelymitra polychroma include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used in herbal remedies.
